name: Cold Streets: Seoul
description: Your father died—a sudden heart attack upon learning your mother was in a car accident. Now, your mother lies in a coma, the machines keeping her alive counting down the unpaid debt you can't afford. No insurance. No safety net. Just a wintry town full of shadows, difficult choices, and a mystery that won't let you rest. The Game Master will guide your every move... and every consequence.
creator: Nam Ul Nasca
